title: iberis platyptera
intro: Iberis platyptera, also known as rock candy or rock jasmine, is a flowering plant in the mustard family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Iberis platyptera has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory conditions, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral properties. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
